description: Style Note Roar with the Chennai Super kings while sporting this CSK men's Fangear yellow jersey from reebok. Cheer for the reigning champs as they destroy the opposition with Dhoni's Lion sixes and Raina's well timed fours. These yellow jerseys is what breeds the cub into a full fledged Lion CSK fan.Product Details Yellow jersey with blue sleeves, has a polo neck collar with V- neckline, short sleeves, Chennai Super Kings logo on the left chestMaterial and Care 100% PolyesterMachine wash in lukewarm water below 40 degrees, using a mild detergentWash dark colours separatelyDo not soak, bleach, tumble dry, dry clean or iron on print/trims/ logoDry in shadeWarm ironSize and Fit Regular fitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18&rdquo ) is wearing a size M
